summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Asian Financial Market Prediction Platform. Backend APIs functional with 90.9% success rate. Frontend UI working with professional dark theme. Main issues: Yahoo Finance API rate limiting and MiniMax M2.5 JSON parsing errors.

critical_bugs.issue: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests - Rate limiting on Yahoo Finance data source
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks real-time market data fetching, falls back to simulated data

critical_bugs.issue: Failed to parse AI response: No JSON found - MiniMax API returns non-JSON response
critical_bugs.impact: AI predictions work but may return fallback data instead of actual AI analysis

performance_issues.issue: AI prediction takes 45+ seconds to respond
performance_issues.symptoms: Frontend times out waiting for prediction results
performance_issues.workaround: Increase timeout or implement async processing

performance_issues.issue: Divination prediction takes 45+ seconds to respond
performance_issues.symptoms: Frontend times out waiting for divination results
performance_issues.workaround: Increase timeout or implement async processing

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width(-1) and height(-1)
ui_bugs.selector: Chart containers in stock detail page

integration_issues.issue: Frontend times out after 45 seconds waiting for AI prediction response
Frontend times out after 45 seconds waiting for divination response

working_features: Stock detail page with historical charts

passed_tests: Frontend homepage loading with market data
Market navigation between A股/港股/日股/韩股/泰股/期货/外汇
Stock search and detail page navigation
UI responsiveness and dark theme design
Real-time market data display with proper formatting
Chart rendering for stock historical data

high_priority: Fix Yahoo Finance API rate limiting - implement caching or alternative data source
Fix MiniMax M2.5 API response parsing - ensure JSON format compliance
Optimize AI/Divination response times or implement async processing
medium_priority: Add loading states with progress indicators for AI/Divination
Implement retry logic for failed API calls
low_priority: Add error handling for API timeouts
